title: iva asperifolia
intro: Iva asperifolia, also known as the rough groundsel or rough marshelder, is a perennial herb in the family Asteraceae that is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Iva asperifolia include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to support immune function and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Iva asperifolia can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's roots and rhizomes to make a tincture or decoction.
